name: עוזר אירוע אישי — גרסה בטוחה
principles: One embedded assistant component serves all clients; context is isolated by eventId and client session.
Questions are answered directly from event state before any action flow starts.
Data-changing actions require explicit action verbs such as add/update/assign/prepare.
The assistant never treats its own examples as user commands.
WhatsApp is draft-only from the assistant; actual sending remains in the WhatsApp module after user approval.
No OpenClaw sub-agents or workspaces are created for app clients.

safety.dbWrites: Only Cloudflare Worker /api/event-actions writes to EVENTS_KV after requireEventAccess validation; Opal/OpenClaw never writes DB directly.

qaPrompts: תוסיף את משפחת ימיני עם 5 משתתפים לשולחן 5 טלפון 0528746137
תוסיף את איתי מיידר, אישר הגעה, מוזמן 1, לשולחן 2 עם עמי מיידר
brain: Opal/OpenClaw-backed intent planner via OPAL_EMBEDDED_ASSISTANT_URL; no LLM key is stored in Ami Cloudflare or client browser
